description: Product Description FROM THE MANUFACTURER Premium Quality Super Soft Terry Waterproof Mattress Protector Topper Cover Our Premium Quality Mattress Protector Topper cover is 100 % waterproof and it provide your expansive investment 24hrs protection. We manufactuer 100% non - noisy comfort Waterproof fitted sheet which stay silent while you Toss & Turn on your bed by assuring you a peaceful sleep. We use specially design knitted stretchable polyester Jersey skirt with a strong grip elastic to ensure a snug fit for both Deep and Extra Deep Mattresses and it would not slide away from its position while you sleeping. What Makes CAROLINE SHATUIK Terry Towel Mattress Protector Different? 1. Vinyl & PVC free which is breathable,Non - Noisy & Waterproof. 2.
